goal: Restructure the standalone diffusil report to match the customer_demo_062026.html views/flow: two top-level tabs (Product & Functional Promise, Markets) and a market->VN/BOM tree+detail drilldown using the demo's tree-rail + detail-panel design, adapted to @node42/ui-kit design tokens. Real report.json data only; 6 markets have full VN+pyramid, 33 do not.

design_translation.principle: Copy the demo's STRUCTURE/LAYOUT/INTERACTION, NOT its 'Sterile Injectables' data. Re-skin demo CSS classes onto kit tokens.

token_map.--surface / card bg: var(--color-page) elevated via var(--background-* ) — use raw div with background:#f7f7f7-equivalent token: var(--color-page) lighter; concretely use kit ContentCard/WidgetCard where a card is whole-width, and raw divs with border:1px solid var(--border-*) + var(--radius-md) for tree/detail panels
token_map.level pin .lvl: kit Badge variant="color" size="xs" for L5+/normal; Badge variant="information" for L7/L6 (the demo .lvl.h)
token_map.fit % bands: kit ConfidenceBadge value={fitPct} (direct=90 high / adjacent=65 medium / stretch=40 low)
token_map.esco occ chips: raw chip div + Badge for code + ConfidenceBadge value={esco.confidence}

routes./: Redirect or render the two-tab shell with default tab 'product'. App shell = AppShell.tsx (Navbar + report sidebar kept for Glossary/About reachability). Top of content = horizontal kit Tab row: 'Product & Functional Promise' | 'Markets'.
routes./markets: Tab 2 — ranked 39-market universe table + dimension view for the 6 dimension_markets.
routes./markets/:naics: Market drilldown. If naics in stage3 (6 markets) -> VN/BOM tree+detail viz. Else -> ranking/dimension detail + 'Value network not yet built for this market' empty state.

blocks: Hero: functional_promise (large, ContentCard) + commodity_functional_promise (labelled 'Commodity-level functional promise')
Sortable ranked table of 39 universe markets: rank, naics, title, paths[] (Badges), composite, 6 score columns, rationale (expandable). Rows CLICKABLE -> /markets/:naics.
Rows whose naics is in stage3 get a 'VN available' pin Badge (success); others get neutral 'ranking only'.
Below: the demo Market view (dimensions + L2/L3) shown for the markets that have dimension_markets (the 6) — accessible from the drilldown, not duplicated here.

market_drilldown.lookup: Match :naics to stage3 by leading numeric prefix (stage3 naics keys are inconsistent: '333242' vs '333314 — Optical...'). Helper findStage3(naics) and findDimensionMarket(naics).
market_drilldown.market_dimensions: demo Market view from dimension_markets[naics] (all_dimensions demand/supply grid, chosen dim -> L2 -> L3). Honest empty if no dimension_market.
market_drilldown.no_vn_state: For the 33 markets without stage3: show universe scorecard + rationale + dimension view if present, and an InfoCard/empty banner 'Value network not yet built for this market'. Never fabricate VN/stakeholders.

MarketDrilldown.tsx.MarketHeader: title + NAICS chip + composite + paths + breadcrumb (Markets > <title>)

DemoTree.tsx.purpose: Custom tree-rail re-creating demo .tree/.trow with kit tokens. Level pins, selectable rows (var(--background-information) when selected), right-side pins.
DemoTree.tsx.TreeRow_shape: { id, level, name, cfj, depth, hasConnected:boolean, connectedCount:number, hasStakeholders:boolean }
DemoTree.tsx.tree_build: Units are flat with no parent links. Build nesting by level order (VN: L7>L6>L6a>L5>L4; BOM: L0>L1>L2>L3>L4>L5) — each unit is a child of the most recent preceding unit one level up (stack-based). Depth drives indentation (depth*15px spacer like demo). Expand L7/root by default; auto-select the intersection unit.
DemoTree.tsx.pins: connected-product pin (success Badge '▣ N') when unit matched by an intersection; stakeholder pin (warning Badge '◐ N') when unit == pyramid.intersection_unit (has prototype_roles).

VN_unit: breadcrumb chain of levels (L7 > L6 > L5 ...) via parent stack
CONNECTED PRODUCTS: for each intersection matching this unit -> green cp card: 'diffusil-<x>' name + ConfidenceBadge(fitPct) labelled 'derived from fit: <fit>' + role/where/rationale text
STAKEHOLDER ROLES (only on the pyramid.intersection_unit): RoleCard per prototype_role
BOM_unit: component title + level Badge + function text
CONNECTED PRODUCTS where a BOM intersection sits on this unit (same green cp card + fit band)
No pyramid stakeholders on BOM rows (pyramid is VN-anchored); if BOM unit corresponds to the intersection element, link/note to the VN stakeholder view

RoleCard.tsx.data: pyramid.prototype_roles[] (5 Burleson types: job_executor, job_overseer, purchase_executor, purchase_influencer, job_beneficiary)
fields: ESCO chips: esco[]{code,title,confidence} -> chip with mono code + title + ConfidenceBadge(confidence)

vn_viz_component_tree.PyramidContext.tsx (optional sub-block i: pyramid.cfj_path (L7->L6->L5 chain), top_employers[]{name,employee_count,source} table with Sources link

fit_band_mapping.render: ConfidenceBadge value={pct} level={level}; caption 'derived from fit' so the band is clearly labelled as derived, not measured.
fit_band_mapping.note: Existing src/pages/Stakeholders.tsx already has FIT_LEVEL map (direct->high etc.) — reuse/centralize into src/fit.ts.

intersection_matching.to_vn_unit: intersection.unit string embeds both VN and BOM names. Match a VN tree row when row.name (normalized) is a substring of intersection.unit AND intersection.path includes 'vn' OR generic. Count multiple intersections per unit.
intersection_matching.to_bom_unit: Match when row.name substring of intersection.unit (BOM L# token present).
intersection_matching.pyramid_unit: Mark the VN row whose name is contained in pyramid.intersection_unit as the stakeholder-bearing unit; attach prototype_roles there.
intersection_matching.diffusil_product_name: Connected product label = product.name ('diffusil-...') from report.product; the % is the fit band, the where/role/rationale come from the intersection.

kit_components_used: ContentCard / WidgetCard / WidgetItemField (product blocks, detail cards)
custom_token_styled_blocks: DemoTree rows (.trow re-skin): raw div, var(--background-information) selected, var(--border-default), var(--radius-sm)
Stakeholder role card (.role): raw card var(--border-default)+var(--radius-sm)
data_d_ts_update: report.d.ts: add Pyramid types (intersection_unit, cfj_path[]{level,unit,cfj}, top_employers[]{name,employee_count,source}, prototype_roles[]{role,type_label,prototype_name,cfj,esco[]{code,title,confidence},incentive_categories[],core_jobs[]{statement,category,incentive_driver},emotional_jobs[]{feeling,from_incentive},status_jobs[]{statement,identity_kind,from_incentive}}). Add pyramid to Stage3Segment. UniverseScores keys already correct.

hard_requirements.build: npm run build (tsc -b && vite build) MUST pass; TypeScript clean.
hard_requirements.css_tokens: Keep src/index.css @import of tokens.css+globals.css; after build verify dist CSS contains ':root' and '--space-300:'.
hard_requirements.config: Keep vite base '/difusil_markets_vn/', router basename, .github/workflows/deploy.yml unchanged.
hard_requirements.data: Real report.json only; no fabricated VN/stakeholder data; 33 no-VN markets get honest empty state.

files.replace_main_router: src/main.tsx — routes: /, /product, /markets, /markets/:naics, /glossary, /about (drop /universe,/ranking,/dimensions,/stakeholders standalone routes; their content folds into the two tabs/drilldown).
update: src/ReportSidebar.tsx (point at /product, /markets, /glossary, /about) OR remove sidebar sub-nav in favour of tabs
reuse_then_remove: src/pages/Stakeholders.tsx -> harvest tree/fit logic into DemoTree/UnitDetail then remove
keep: src/pages/Overview.tsx (optional, fold into Markets or drop)
